    • SequenceDataSource

    Class SequenceDataSource

    defines a sequence of numbers for our stream input

    Methods

    current

    • current(): number | ITERATION_STATUS

      returns the current element, returns the same element as the previous next call if there is no next before current called then we will call next as initial element

      Returns number | ITERATION_STATUS

      Implementation of IStreamDataSource.current

      • Defined in SourcesCollectors.ts:233

    hasNext

    • hasNext(): boolean

      Returns boolean

      true if additional data is present false if not

      Implementation of IStreamDataSource.hasNext

      • Defined in SourcesCollectors.ts:212

    lookAhead

    • lookAhead(cnt?: number): number | ITERATION_STATUS

      looks ahead cnt without changing the internal data "pointers" of the data source (this is mostly needed by possibly infinite constructs like lazy streams, because they do not know by definition their boundaries)

      Parameters

      • cnt: number = 1

        the elements to look ahead

      Returns number | ITERATION_STATUS

      either the element or ITERATION_STATUS.EO_STRM if we hit the end of the stream before finding the "cnt" element

      Implementation of IStreamDataSource.lookAhead

      • Defined in SourcesCollectors.ts:221

    next

    • next(): number | ITERATION_STATUS

      returns the next element in the stream

      Returns number | ITERATION_STATUS

      Implementation of IStreamDataSource.next

      • Defined in SourcesCollectors.ts:216

    reset

    • reset(): void

      resets the position to the beginning

      Returns void

      Implementation of IStreamDataSource.reset

      • Defined in SourcesCollectors.ts:229
